narration_text: Now we'll see how the internet's original design has impacted its security. The internet wasn't built with security in mind, it was initially envisioned as a network where users trusted each other. As a result, the designers have been playing catch-up, trying to incorporate security into all layers of the internet protocol. Let's think about this together, if a system is designed without security considerations, it's much harder to add them later on. I want you to focus on the fact that we need to consider how attackers can exploit vulnerabilities in computer networks and how we can defend against these attacks. This will lead us to discuss ways to design more secure network architectures.
